name: Underbed Fabric Bin with Lid Light Gray - Brightroom™
description:
Keep extra linens, out-of-season clothing and more neatly stowed out of sight in this convenient Underbed Fabric Bin with Lid from Brightroom™. Featuring a simple rectangular design that's conveniently sized to slide under a bed or place on a Brightroom stackable shelf, this fabric box with lid is a great way to keep your home organized while keeping the items inside free of dust and debris. The hinged lid design means you can easily open one half at a time, and built-in fabric handles on both the short and long sides of the rectangle make it easy to slide out from its storage spot.

Brightroom™ started with a simple truth: When you’ve got it together, you feel better. Our versatile designs reveal the possibility in every closet, cupboard and drawer, and work together to create brilliant ways to organize your every day.
